THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE JR., JOHNNY J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WHITE, WYNETTA Q. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH LIABILITY FOR ABUSE OF PROCESS, MALICIOUS PROSECUTION, OR FALSE IMPRISONMENT.
